# Practice Quizzes: Are They Helpful?

## Results Of The Data.

Based on my results, I think providing more quiz practice and review materials would help out students more in COMP 110. The data from the survey showed how students rated quiz effectiveness, course difficulty, student understanding, and course value. Looking at these categories together helped me see that quizzes are connected to more than just grades. They also affect how prepared and confident students feel in the course.

If students find the course difficult or do not feel fully confident in their understanding, then extra quiz practice could help them prepare before assessments. Practice questions, review worksheets, or short quiz-style examples would give students a clearer idea of what to expect and would let them check their understanding before the actual quiz. This could make quizzes feel more useful as a learning tool instead of only as an evaluation.

Overall, I think that COMP110 should add more optional quiz review materials before quizzes. This would benefit students by giving them more chances to practice, reduce uncertainty, and improve their confidence with course concepts.
